Hello, welcome to Barclays Bank. I'm your banking assistant.

Hello, I'm calling about a charge on my account that I don't recognize. I'm an 80-year-old customer and I'm having trouble remembering the details. 

My account number is 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8. I think my sort code might be 3 3 1 1 2 2, but I'm not completely sure - it could also be 1 1 2 2 3 3 or 1 1 3 3 2 2. I've had this account for a very long time.

There was a charge of around £89 from Amazon that I don't recall making. Can you please look into this for me and let me know what it was for? I want to make sure it's legitimate.
